---
title: "Differential Gene Expression of WT vs delta at 37°C in YPD + CFW samples"
author: "Edward Wallace"
date: "2024-12-04"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
---


# Summary

Differential Gene Expression WT vs delta at 37°C in YPD samples, using DESeq2

This analysis produces files:

- `deseq_df_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW.txt`
- `deglist_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW_up2x_FDR5.txt`
- `deglist_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW_down2x_FDR5.txt`

## Load count data from shared script load_count_data.Rmd

```{r call_load_count_data, child = "load_count_data.Rmd"}
```

# DESeq on a subset of data, only 37C in YPD

```{r subset_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW, fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
sample_sheet_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW <-
  dplyr::filter(sample_sheet,
                Temperature == "37", Media == "YPD_CFW")

dds_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW <- 
  DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
    countData = counts_all %>%
      dplyr::select(sample_sheet_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW$SampleName) %>%
      magrittr::set_rownames(counts_all$Gene),
    colData = sample_sheet_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW,
    design = ~ FLC1) %>%
  DESeq()

dds_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW
```

```{r results_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW}
results(dds_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW)

resultsNames(dds_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW)
```

```{r deseq_df_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW}
deseq_df_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW <- 
  biobroom::tidy.DESeqDataSet(dds_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "FLC1_WT_vs_delta") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(gene_info_df,
                   by = "gene") %>% 
  dplyr::select(gene, 
                geneName, 
                baseMean, 
                log2FC = estimate, 
                stderror,
                padj = p.adjusted)
```

## List DEGs most UP in WT vs delta

We cut off at 2x changes with 5% FDR here.


```{r DEGs_WT_up, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 3}
# Make data frames of DEGs up and down, arranged by log2FC
DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_up2x_FDR5 <- 
  dplyr::filter(deseq_df_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW,
                log2FC > 1, padj < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(log2FC))
print(DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_up2x_FDR5, n = 20)
```

Print the top 20 *named* DEGs

```{r DEGs_WT_up_named}
DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_up2x_FDR5 %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(geneName)) %>%
  print(n = 20)
```


## List DEGs most DOWN in WT vs delta


```{r DEGs_WT_down, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 3}
# Make data frames of DEGs up and down, arranged by log2FC
DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_down2x_FDR5 <- 
  dplyr::filter(deseq_df_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW,
                log2FC < -1, padj < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(log2FC)
print(DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_down2x_FDR5, n = 20)
```

Print the top 20 *named* DEGs

```{r DEGs_37C_down_named}
DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_down2x_FDR5 %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(geneName)) %>%
  print(n = 20)

plot_labels_down <- DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_down2x_FDR5 %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(geneName))
```

## Volcano plot of DEGs

```{r volcano_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 3}
volcano_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW <- 
 ggplot(data = deseq_df_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW,
         aes(x = log2FC, y = -log10(padj)) ) +
  geom_point(size = 0.3, colour = "grey70") +
  geom_point(data = DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_up2x_FDR5,
             size = 0.3, colour = "darkblue") +
  geom_point(data = DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_down2x_FDR5,
             size = 0.3, colour = "darkred") +
  #geom_text_repel(data = plot_labels_down, aes(label = geneName), size = 3, colour = "darkred") + 
  scale_y_continuous("-log10(p)",
                     limits = c(0,50), expand = c(0,0),
                     oob=scales::squish) +
  scale_x_continuous("log2 fold-change\n← up in flc1∆       up in FLC1 →",
                     breaks = -6:6,
                     limits = c(-6,6), expand = c(0.01,0.01),
                     oob = scales::squish) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") 
volcano_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW
```

The volcano plot shows extensive differential gene expression, with more genes substantially down in WT (i.e. up in FLC1∆).



## Write outputs to files

```{r write_DEGs}
deseq_df_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(c(baseMean, log2FC, stderror), round, digits = 3)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(padj = signif(padj, digits = 4)) %>%
  write_tsv(file = here::here("results", "DEGs",
                              "deseq_df_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW.txt"))

DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_up2x_FDR5 %>%
  dplyr::pull(gene) %>%
  write_lines(file = here::here("results", "DEGs",
                            "deglist_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW_up2x_FDR5.txt"))

DEGdf_WT_37C_CFW_down2x_FDR5 %>%
  dplyr::pull(gene) %>%
  write_lines(file = here::here("results", "DEGs",
                            "deglist_WTvsdelta_37C_CFW_down2x_FDR5.txt"))
```

# Session Info

Package versions, etc., that ran this file.

```{r session_info,results="show",message=TRUE}
sessionInfo()
```
